name: Multi-Microservices-Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request: # Catch bugs before merging
    branches: [main, master]

jobs:
  Quality-Assurance:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        service: [backend, frontend] # Lint both services in parallel

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Lint Backend and Frontend
        run: |
          cd todo-${{ matrix.service }} &&
          npm install eslint &&
          npx eslint . --ext .js,.ts,.jsx,.tsx ||
          true        # Don't fail on lint errors

      - name: Lint ${{ matrix.service }} Dockerfile
        uses: hadolint/hadolint-action@v3.1.0
        with:
          dockerfile: ./todo-${{ matrix.service }}/Dockerfile

      - name: Lint Docker Compose
        run: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config --quiet
        # uses: sjafferali/docker-compose-lint-action@v0.1.2
        # with:
        #   compose-file: "./docker-compose.yml"

      - name: Lint Kubernetes Manifests
        uses: stackrox/kube-linter-action@v1
        with:
          directory: k8s/

      - name: Lint Helm Charts
        run: helm lint todo-app-helm/

  Build-and-Secure:
    needs: Quality-Assurance # Only run if linting succeeds
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      packages: write
      contents: read
    strategy:
      matrix:
        service: [backend, frontend]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Login to GHCR
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Build and push both backend and frontend
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: ./todo-${{ matrix.service }}
          push: true
          build-args: |
            VITE_BACKEND_URL=/api
          tags: |
            ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/todo-${{ matrix.service }}:latest
            ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/todo-${{ matrix.service }}:${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: "ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}/todo-${{ matrix.service }}:latest"
          format: "table"
          exit-code: "1" # Fails the build if high-risk vulns are found
          severity: "CRITICAL,HIGH"

  # Deploy:
  #   needs: Build-and-Secure # Only deploy if build and security checks pass
  #   runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  #   if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'   # only runs when manually triggered
  #   steps:
  #     - name: Checkout repository
  #       uses: actions/checkout@v4

  #     - name: Setup Helm
  #       uses: azure/setup-helm@v3

  #     - name: Deploy to Kubernetes (placeholder)
  #       run: |
  #         echo "Deploying Helm chart..."
  #         echo "  helm upgrade --install todo-app ./todo-app-helm \\"
  #         echo "    --namespace todo-app --create-namespace \\"
  #         echo "    --set backend.image=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ github.repository_owner }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_BACKEND }}:${{ github.sha }} \\"
  #         echo "    --set frontend.image=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ github.repository_owner }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}:${{ github.sha }}"
  #         # When you have a cluster accessible, uncomment the actual command:
  #         # helm upgrade --install todo-app ./todo-app-helm \
  #         #   --namespace todo-app --create-namespace \
  #         #   --set backend.image=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ github.repository_owner }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_BACKEND }}:${{ github.sha }} \
  #         #   --set frontend.image=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ github.repository_owner }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME_FRONTEND }}:${{ github.sha }}
